---
title: "skill_forger.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\skill_forger.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.42
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 5.57
---

## Intent
The `skill_forger.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SkillForger, __init__, sv_forge_skill. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SkillForger, __init__, sv_forge_skill. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.sandbox_warden](file://src.sentinel.wardens.sandbox_warden)

### Exports
- `SkillForger`
- `__init__`
- `sv_forge_skill`
